# attemptRecovery(optionIndex:)

**Instance Method**

Attempt to recover from this error when someone selects the option at the given index.

## Declaration

```swift
func attemptRecovery(optionIndex recoveryOptionIndex: Int) -> Bool
```

## Return Value

`true` to indicate successful recovery; otherwise `false`.

## Recovering from errors

- **attemptRecovery(optionIndex:resultHandler:)**: Attempt to recover from this error when someone selects the option at the given index.
